notes: WP-UX-08 viewport error recovery: li-render wgpu smoke maps to studio_err_gpu via studio_viewport_error_kind_for_render_smoke; studio_viewport_error_sync_render on host frame; one-click retry via studio_shell_handle_viewport_error_pointer; smoke studio_viewport_error.li extended (render bridge + pointer retry). li_std_studio_version 18.
